particulars.description: Land and buildings on the south side or river lane saltney being the former ed weetman warehouse title number WA393228. By way of fixed charge the benefit of all covenants and rights concerning the property and plant machinery fixtures fittings furniture equipment implements and utensils the goodwill of any business carried on at the property and the proceeds of any insurance affecting the property or assets.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever

particulars.description: A charge by way of legal mortgage over the piece of land containing one half acre together with the buildings erected threon situate at river lane saltney clwyd and the proceeds of sale thereof.. Fixed and floating charges over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts uncalled capital buildings fixtures fixed plant and machinery.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
